title: O&B Death and Glory 2: Blades of Change
description: Modpack for the Lilly's Senpai SMP server, a kitchen sink/adventure-focused pack with casual to dedicated playstyle in mind.
body:
There are so many things to do, and plenty to see and explore. Never a dull moment anywhere you travel to. 

  ♦ ♦ ♦


Tektonic has a fantastic world generation in cooperation with Incendium, Nullscape, and Thermic Expansion that will help you find that perfect place to call home. There are an amazing array of biomes to choose from in the overworld, nether, and in the end! 

 ♦ ♦ ♦


This season we're getting creative... with Biomancy and Supplementaries! 

Whether you're building an industrial mining factory, farming, or even a confectionary, we're excited to see what you can make!



 ♦ ♦ ♦ 

If you’re more into settling down and just building, we have so many mods that are perfect for decorating and customizing your home.  We also have Varients & Ventures, Terramity, Enderman and Creeper Overhaul and Alex's Mobs if you'd rather explore and catalog wildlife.

 ♦ ♦ ♦

Are you the type that needs to test your mettle against strong foes?

We have Terramity addons and Aquamirae.

  ♦ ♦ ♦

Download the pack now and check out what AMAZING other features there are to add to your Origins experience! This mod pack has been designed with playability in mind, meaning there is so much for you to do and explore. So many possibilities for your survival world OR your experience on the SMP!!

  ♦ ♦ ♦

Join the discord using the link in the image above to come and hang out with loads of friendly, helpful, and skilled Minecraft players!! 




Check out Senpai's other mod pack!!



Astral Blood mod pack - Click below
